title: biscutella lucentina
intro: Biscutella lucentina, also known as Lucent Flower or Lucentine, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and North Africa. Traditionally, Biscutella lucentina has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Biscutella lucentina is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules for its medicinal properties.
